description: FGAP-039: add the bilingual-language-improvement measurement strand (a staff English-usage measure and a student bilingual-progress measure) as a generation contract + a per-spec in-execution self-check on the measurement-bearing step; distinct from the Bilingual-Communicators-SLO coverage entry.
acceptance_criteria: During generation of the measurement-bearing step, the step's self-check fails when the bilingual measurement strand -- a staff English-usage measure and a student bilingual-progress measure -- is neither produced nor recorded as an explicit not-this-cycle gap, and passes when it is one or the other; demonstrated on an input that would otherwise omit it.

Over a full assembled draft, the bilingual measurement strand (staff and student) is present or recorded as an explicit gap, distinct from the Bilingual-Communicators-SLO coverage entry, confirmed by a whole-draft check.

No previously-passing check moves from passing to failing: outputs parse, the catalogue-gate raises no new rejection, the parity gate passes 14/14, the project gate is green, and every existing in-execution and whole-draft check stays passing.
